headline: Valve is so behind on Steam Controller orders that some won’t ship until 2027
summary: Valve is facing significant backlogs for Steam Controller orders. New reservations are now estimated to ship between September 2026 and sometime in 2027. This reveals a substantial delay in production and delivery for the popular gamepad.

headline: You can now use the Game Boy Camera with your phone
summary: The $50 GB Operator accessory now enables direct use of the Game Boy Camera with smartphones. Users can connect their classic Game Boy Camera to iOS and Android devices. This update brings charmingly retro photography capabilities to modern mobile platforms.

headline: HBO Max’s annual plans are 28 percent off right now
summary: HBO Max is currently offering a 28 percent discount on all its yearly subscription plans. New and returning subscribers can take advantage of the deal until July 15, 2026. The ad-supported tier, for example, is reduced to $78.99, saving users $31.

headline: Snap’s Specs look good on nobody
summary: Snap has unveiled new AR smart glasses called Specs, showcasing impressive face-computer technology. Despite advanced features and a compact design, their aesthetic appeal is critically questioned. The high-tech device comes with a hefty price tag of $2,195.

headline: A New Free Steam Game Is Topping the Most-Played Charts, But It's Also Leading to False Bans
summary: A new free Steam game, 'TBH: Task Bar Hero,' has unexpectedly surged to the top of most-played charts. Its rapid popularity has generated significant buzz within the gaming community. However, the game is also reportedly causing a wave of false bans for players.

headline: How the Grinch Stole Christmas Sequel in the Works with Jim Carrey and Ron Howard
summary: A sequel to 'How the Grinch Stole Christmas' is reportedly under development. Jim Carrey is currently in talks to reprise his iconic role as the Grinch. Ron Howard is also expected to return to direct the upcoming follow-up film.

headline: The Tiny Aoostar Ryzen 7 Pro 6850H Mini PC with 24GB of DDR5 RAM and USB 4 Ports Drops to $266
summary: The Aoostar Ryzen 7 Pro 6850H Mini PC is now available for just $266, featuring a significant price drop. This compact device packs 24GB of DDR5 RAM and multiple USB 4 ports. It offers powerful performance comparable to a Mac Mini at a much lower cost.

headline: Get a UrLife E20 1,000W Peak 48V Adult Electric Bike With 28mph Top Speed and 80 Mile Range for $297
summary: The UrLife E20 adult electric bike is on sale for an exceptional price of $297. It features a powerful 1,000W peak motor, allowing for speeds up to 28mph. Riders can enjoy an impressive range of up to 80 miles on a single charge.

headline: Man arrested on suspicion of attempted murder after boy injured in crocodile enclosure
summary: A man has been arrested on suspicion of attempted murder following an incident in a crocodile enclosure. A three-year-old boy was critically injured but is now in stable condition at Addenbrooke's Hospital. Cambridgeshire Police are actively investigating the circumstances surrounding the child's injuries.

headline: US lifts naval blockade as Iran's supreme leader says Trump made deal 'out of desperation'
summary: The United States has officially lifted its naval blockade against Iran. Iran's supreme leader claims that Donald Trump agreed to the deal 'out of desperation.' This development signifies a major shift in the ongoing diplomatic relations between the two nations.

headline: Bowen: US-Iran deal raises inescapable question of what the war was for
summary: The new US-Iran deal prompts critical questions regarding the true purpose and outcome of the previous conflict. Despite significant human costs, the Iranian regime appears to have been empowered, rather than weakened. This outcome challenges the effectiveness and rationale behind the prolonged engagement.

headline: Teacher who murdered adopted baby son Preston Davey given whole life prison sentence
summary: A teacher, Jamie Varley, has been handed a whole life prison sentence for the murder of his adopted baby son, Preston Davey. The infant tragically died after enduring months of severe sexual and physical abuse. The court delivered a rare and exceptionally harsh sentence reflecting the brutality of the crime.
